pue_source: EcoDataCenter To Deploy World's First Chassis-Level Immersion Liquid Cooling
notes: TRIPLE MATCH: PUE 1.03, Iceotope chassis-level immersion cooling, ~2MW facility. World's first chassis-level immersion deployment. Climate-positive via district heating waste heat reuse. 14% CapEx savings, 90% rack cooling energy reduction.
Fjord-cooled mountain hall. PUE near 1.10 achieved. Offers DLC and immersion for highest densities. 8°C constant fjord water at 100m depth. Closed-loop titanium heat exchangers.
PUE 1.18, closed-loop water-free ring chilled water system. 54MW campus. 83% of CyrusOne 2023 new builds use water-free cooling. Frankfurt hub.

pue_source: Liquid vs Air Cooling for Data Centers 2026: Cost & Efficiency Analysis
notes: OCP-compliant Submer immersion deployment running 150kW racks at PUE 1.05. Completed Jan 2025. Competitive intelligence — Submer is a competitor.
DLC, PUE <1.2, waste heat to 8000 homes.
PUE 1.004. 16 patents. Competitor intel.
TRIPLE MATCH: Submer immersion, sub-1.1 PUE, 50kW.
DLC 100kW+/rack. PUE <1.2. 42MW. 1GW campus.
DTC + air. 130kW/rack. NVIDIA DGX-Ready.
85% liquid-cooled. 4600 Blackwell GPUs.
PUE 1.15 at 70% load. 20.5MW. Adiabatic free cooling. Air-cooled — retrofit opportunity for liquid.
PUE 1.01 in hot humid Hong Kong. 40MW IT load. 252kW/rack. Two-phase immersion. Competitive intel — world benchmark.
PUE 1.1 via Air-to-Air evaporative cooling. No liquid yet — retrofit opportunity. 65+ MW across 8 Nordic DCs.
78MW hyperscale, PUE 1.2 (Amsterdam mandate). EUR 1B+ investment. Jan 2026 construction start. Single hyperscale customer.
Modular cooling + Aquifer Thermal Energy Storage (liquid). 100% renewable. AMS-IX/NL-IX connected.
PUE ~1.1. Seawater cooling via quarter-mile granite tunnel. Pioneering natural liquid cooling. Competitive intel for Google's approach.
27MW, 3x 9MW halls. Closed-loop water cooling. BREEAM Very Good. 100% renewable. Heat reuse design.
54MW, 6x 9MW halls. Closed-loop water cooling. Heat reuse ready. 500sqm solar. BREEAM.
Finnish DC — cold climate free cooling. No verified target metrics. Market context only.
Submer's first owned 56MW DC. Barcelona. Immersion at scale. Zero water. COMPETITOR — 400MW+ deployed globally.
120MW — world's largest liquid-cooled DC (2018). PUE 1.02. Two-phase immersion. Hot climate proof. COMPETITOR BENCHMARK.
40MW. PUE 1.03. Densest immersion DC at time of build (2015). COMPETITOR BENCHMARK.
TRIPLE MATCH: PUE 1.04, liquid cooling, 6.4MW. EU flagship HPC. Waste heat = 20% of Kajaani district heating.
12MW launched (expanding to 72MW+). PUE ≤1.2. DLC supported. 100% geothermal+hydro. Waste heat to agtech.
10MW full immersion. 368kW/rack. Tier III target. AI/GPUaaS. 15-year deal. Q4 2026 handover.
10MW full immersion. 368kW/rack. Mirror of Riyadh facility. Q4 2026.
1MW operational immersion in UAE. Edge/colo. Sharjah Research Park.
NVIDIA's own $1.5B facility. Blackwell + specialized liquid cooling. Largest NVIDIA lab outside US. 840MW Hagit power.
EUROPE'S FIRST GB300 NVL72. 60K+ GPUs. NVIDIA-designed liquid cooling. 75MW. $1B+ EU investment.
TRIPLE MATCH: PUE <1.05, 100% fanless DLC, 4.96MW. BullSequana XH3000. EU sovereign HPC. Warm water 40C.
6MW (qualifies!). Proprietary DUG Cool single-phase immersion. World's first carbon-free HPC campus target. 45-hectare site.
PUE <1.02 in TROPICAL Singapore via Firmus immersion. Extraordinary achievement in hot/humid climate.
5MW two-phase immersion hall. 120kW/rack. Major Korean telecom. 5G + AI integration.
PUE 1.1. 20MW. Liquid cooling up to 100kW/rack. Air-to-Air evaporative + DLC. 100% renewable hydro+wind.
PUE 1.015-1.02 WORLD RECORD. Research testbed. Partners: Meta, Ericsson, Vertiv, ABB.
13,800 GB300 GPUs. $830M. European AI champion. Liquid cooling required.
FIRST industrial-scale DLC in EU colo. 130-140kW/rack. 250MW DLC pipeline. Commissioning April 2026.
PFAS-free plant-based immersion fluid (Oleon). Avoids regulatory risk. Paris.
45K GB200 GPUs. £2B UK investment. Q4 2026 live. Also Verne Iceland + Microsoft Norway.
230MW. 100K GPUs by end 2026. Microsoft $6.2B. Hydropower. Heat recovery. Stargate brand.
20K H100 GPUs. NexGen Cloud $1B anchor. DLC+immersion+RDHX. Expanding to 171MW.
Korea's LARGEST DC. 114MW. GRC immersion (80% electricity cut). Samsung SDS building National AI Computing Center.
GB200 NVL72 liquid-cooled. 150→400MW. Former Sharp LCD factory. Stargate partner.
36MW. DLC testing (LiquidStack immersion). Partial PUE 1.07 at Mitaka test.
1000 H200 + 1100 Blackwell. Container-type DC. Japan's first gov cloud. 100% renewable.
1.5GW Red Sea coast. $5B. Seawater cooling. 100% renewable. NEOM megaproject.
20,736 Blackwell Ultra. $2B+. Asia's largest Tier IV. PUE <1.2. 2.25GW+ scalable.
50MW. Immersion cooling. 100% solar. $4B plan. India's largest conglomerate.

address: Eldorado do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul
notes: 5GW authorization! PUE 1.2 (lowest LATAM). Zero-water liquid cooling. 100% renewable.
PUE 1.15! 400kW/rack DLC. Waterless. Merlin Properties REIT. Also expanding Lisbon.
90MW. Hybrid dry+liquid. Poland = Central EU AI hub. EU EED compliance.
Greek DC with immersion cooling. Two cities (Athens+Thessaloniki). 250MW Athens pipeline.
16MW. 150kW DLC. Belgium AI-ready. Opened Jan 2026.
Ireland's FIRST liquid-cooled Blackwell. B200 HGX. Dell supplying. Sovereign compute.
Swiss facility. DGX B200 Blackwell. NorthC expanding from NL. Basel pharma/biotech hub.
$1.4B. 4,608 Blackwell GPUs (GB200 NVL72). DLC required. Taiwan semi hub.
500MW! NVIDIA partner. GB200 Blackwell. 400kW/rack DLC. Korean op in Africa.
Africa's first major liquid-cooled facility. 40MW. Digital Realty subsidiary.
$1B. Thailand's first 1GW platform. Liquid cooling. Floating solar.
A$7B. 550MW. OpenAI partnership confirmed. Closed-loop no potable water.
50MW. 20K+ Blackwell GPUs. DLC+immersion+RDHX. Australia's largest operator.
310MW AI factory. Closed-loop liquid + heat recovery. Rubin-ready. Finland's largest planned.
Europe's FIRST DC microgrid. Zero-water cooling. 110MW. Solves Irish grid constraint.
150MW. DLC from ground up for H100/Blackwell. xScale 3.0. $3.2B commitment.
First NVIDIA DGX-Ready liquid-cooled DC in Japan. GB200 NVL72.
58MW. Singapore's LARGEST DLC. Carrier-neutral. Expanding 400MW+.
Korea's most advanced AI DC. H100→H200. Liquid cooling. 44kW/rack.
Phases 2-3 adding DLC. Testing immersion. Korea's largest internet co.
DLC + Cool Array tech. Singapore's tallest multi-tenant. $260M.
PUE 1.09. Single-phase immersion. Chinese hyperscaler.
PUE 1.08. ML-controlled cooling. Chinese hyperscaler.
PUE 1.12 target. DLC+immersion. 600MW campus. India Tier 6.
$6.2B. Hydropower. Nscale+Aker partnership. Nordic climate.
WORLD'S LARGEST DC waste heat scheme. 250K people heated. Liquid enables high-temp waste heat.
$9.9B. 300→750MW. NVIDIA+KIA backing. Swedish renewable.
200MW. Liquid cooling N+1. Q2 2026 construction.
98MW. DLC. Vantage acquired for $1.6B. 6 months ahead of schedule.
600MW complex. 100MW operational. Wiwynn=DLC specialist+ZutaCore investor.
$1B. 120MW. DLC from day one. Indonesia's largest+most advanced.
$3B. 300MW. Liquid-ready. Mexico's largest. Aligned parent.
$1.3B. 144MW. Aligned DeltaFlow DLC. Colombia's largest.
$25B! 500MW. Cold climate. Vaca Muerta energy. Stargate network.
UNDERWATER DC. Ocean water cooling. Sealed capsules on seafloor. DeepSeek R1.
Saudi GOVERNMENT AI company. 100MW. Q2 2026 live.
2nd Humain site. 100MW. Q2 2026.
East Africa's LARGEST. Liquid on-chip cooling! $150M. 44MW.
East Africa's FIRST AI-ready. 53MW. 90kW/rack liquid. OCP immersion planned.
10MW qualifies! Oman. Syntys expanding to 120MW+ ($1B).
4MW UNDERGROUND DC. Anti-drone/sabotage. AI compute. Qualifies on MW!
$2.2B continental EU. All liquid-cooled. 100% renewable.
First international DCs. H200 GPUs. $1.3B UK investment.
5.5MW GPU colo. Munich. Qualifies on MW!
62MW. Liquid from design phase. Carrier-neutral. Starwood Capital.
Hokkaido cool climate. Renewable. Away from earthquake zones.
DCs INSIDE wind turbines! 9-12MW/turbine. Seawater cooling. Zero carbon+water.
12MW. DLC for AI density. 100% hydropower.
Pakistan's FIRST liquid immersion DC. XDS expanding from Saudi+UAE.
Nigeria's first major AI DC. 5.5MW online Q2 2026. 100MW target.
€1.8B. 150→500MW. Desert cooling innovation. Africa's largest planned.
2MW. Immersion + liquid. H2 fuel cells. PUE <1.2 claimed. ATES groundwater.
Dedicated immersion colo suites. Eurofiber=first customer. Asperitas DFC 12U tank.
PUE 1.16. World's first multi-storey adiabatic. DLC lab with JetCool. West Two £275M under construction with DLC+air.
Japan's FIRST commercial 2-phase DLC. MHI = major conglomerate. Dec 2025.
$1.5B Saudi investment. LPU (custom ASIC). LPX next-gen will be liquid.
Groq's first EU DC. 4 weeks build. LPU. LPX liquid-cooled future.
240MW AI factory. France sovereign AI. Also Finland 75MW+310MW.
$1B. 100MW. B.Grimm Power. Thailand EEC. AI+cloud.
18MW Phase 1. Liquid for GPUs. Singtel JV. Near Singapore.

Underground mine data center in Nordfjord, Norway. PUE 1.08-1.15 using fjord seawater cooling at 8C from 100m depth. Supports DLC, inline cooling, immersion, and CRAH. 80MW current capacity expanding to 200MW. 90MW cooling via 12x7.5MW heat exchangers. Up to 300kW/rack with DLC. Waste heat recovery program operational. 120,000 sqm whitespace potential.

PUE 1.07 via 100% free-air cooling at 66N latitude (avg 1.3C). 4MW facility on 2.5 hectares, 6 data halls. Acquired by Northern Data AG (2021) rebranded as Ardent. 100% hydroelectric power. GPU/HPC focused. Ardent states liquid cooling planned for future builds. Pod-based 180kW system (18 racks). Up to 25kW/rack.

Underground ex-military tunnel facility near Pori, Finland. 11MW, 8,500 sqm across 9 tunnel halls. Direct liquid cooling (Dell DLC3000) operational since late 2023, up to 80kW/rack. Natural 8C year-round bedrock cooling. 100% renewable energy + own solar plant. 0.5MW modular units. Supports AI/HPC workloads.

Largest certified data center in Nordics. 24MW IT capacity across 15,000 sqm (34,000 sqm total). PUE target <1.2. Liquid cooling for AI/GPU loads (dedicated cooling options PDF). Gcore deployed 1MW+ GPU cluster (H100/A100). Waste heat recovery serves ~14,000 apartments via Helen district heating. 4MW expansion completed early 2025. 100% renewable energy.

PUE 1.10-1.15. Liquid cooling ready since 2023: in-row CDUs, in-rack CDUs, direct-to-chip, rear-door, immersion. Over 100kW/rack supported. District heating connected for waste heat. 100% renewable wind power. OCP Ready certified. Expanding from 24MW to 28MW (Jan 2026). Built 2024.

5MW facility in Stockholm Kista using proprietary fluid-based cooling from sister company GoGreenHost. Up to 100kW/rack. Waste heat at 110C for district heating via Fortum Varme — could heat 10,000 apartments. Part of Stockholm Data Parks initiative. Authorized to serve Swedish government IT. Current operational status unconfirmed.

PUE 1.14 across 36-acre campus. 51MW IT load across 6 modular data centers. Hybrid cooling: free-air, evaporative (indirect), plus liquid cooling 'liquid optimisers'. 100% renewable energy + HVO backup generators. Rainwater harvesting for cooling. Tier III resilience. Operational since 2011. Synchronous replication to London.

PUE below 1.2 via fresh-air evaporative cooling. First London DC to deploy this cooling tech. 12MW total client power, 60,000 sqft. AI-Ready: supports direct-to-chip, immersive, and rear-door heat exchange liquid cooling within same workload. 6 data halls with flexible subdivision. Liquid cooled customer racks since 2015.

PUE 1.2 via ultra-free air cooling. 10MW capacity, 800 racks across 6 data halls. 30,000 sqft. Aqua EcoPro+ free cooling chiller units (3x500kW). Chilled water system with hot/cold aisle containment. No liquid cooling currently — potential retrofit opportunity. 15 miles from Central London.

4MW facility in Farnborough. PUE 1.25. 1,200 racks across 4 data halls (22,000 sqft). Up to 30kW/rack supported. Free cooling chillers. Hall 4 expansion added 380 racks + 1MW IT load. No liquid cooling currently — small facility with potential for upgrade. Enterprise clients (UBS). On same Cody Technology Park as Ark.

DOES NOT QUALIFY. Underground nuclear bunker DC in Sodermalm, Stockholm. 30m below granite. Free-air and mechanical cooling. Heat recovery: 2 heat pumps supply 70m pipe to district heating. Saves 275 MWh/year. Iconic facility but no liquid cooling, no published PUE, no confirmed MW capacity. Included for reference only.

PUE 1.09 via seawater cooling (first in world for DC use, since 2009). Standard PUE 1.2 with chilled water, 1.09-1.1 with seawater. Saves USD 1M annually. Cooling-free over half the year. Part of Stockholm Data Parks. No IT liquid cooling (DTC/immersion) currently confirmed.

50MW operational (15,000 sqm / 129,000 sqft). Expanding to 70MW with 2 NEW buildings designed for liquid cooling (Feb 2025 announcement). Indirect free air cooling up to 35-40C. Heat recovery: 1.3MW heat per 1MW IT via heat pumps (25-30C to 90C). District heating connected. 100% renewable energy + own solar. Tier III equivalent. Land acquired from Onvest for expansion.

company: Boden Type DC / Boden Business Agency
facility_name: Boden Type Data Center One (BTDC One)
notes: WORLD-RECORD PUE: Category 2 PUE 1.025 (instantaneous <1.01). Pod 1 (OCP CPUs) PUE <1.03, Pod 3 (ASICs) PUE <1.003. 600kW total, 180 sqm whitespace. EU H2020 prototype. Patented EcoCooling evaporative system — no liquid cooling. ASHRAE compliant at -30C with <100W overhead for 140kW IT load. Hive Digital partnership.

PUE 1.2 via award-winning evaporative cooling. 2MW capacity, near full. 150,000 sqft across 3 data floors. ~400 cabinets at 4kW/rack. 2N UPS, N+1 generators. No liquid cooling — potential small-facility retrofit opportunity. 100% uptime record.

PUE 1.2 design target. 55MW compute capacity across 6 modular DCs. Mix of direct air, indirect air, and liquid cooling. SQ17 building: 24 data halls at 0.5MW each (12MW total). P1-P3: 6 data rooms at 760kW each (182 cabinets at 4.2kW). Multiple 33kV feeds. 100% renewable energy. Operational since 2010. Supports AI/high-density workloads.
PUE <1.2, liquid cooling available alongside air cooling, 16MW IT capacity. Waste heat feeds local district heating network. 100% renewable energy. Expected Q3 2026 launch. EnEfG compliant.
Design PUE <=1.2, air/liquid/hybrid cooling options, 36-40MW IT capacity. Hyperscale facility for AI and HPC. Expected 2029.

PUE 1.1242 (TUV SUD certified — best result TUV ever recorded). Free air cooling only, no liquid cooling currently. Qualifies on PUE alone. Large facility, not a cooling lead but demonstrates market benchmark.

Target PUE <1.2, advanced liquid cooling + direct-to-chip for AI/HPC, 204MW IT load across 9 data centers. Waste heat district heating for Wustermark municipality. 100% renewable electricity. EUR 3B investment.

PUE <1.2 at full load, 30MW connection capacity for AI or standard workloads. Kyoto Cooling technology. 100% renewable energy, N+1 free cooling. No liquid cooling confirmed — qualifies on PUE. 7,000 sqm IT area.

SMALL FACILITY ~1MW. CO2-positive data center powered 98% by offshore wind. Waste heat from servers cultivates rooftop algae farm that absorbs CO2. EN 50600 certified. Bramstedtlund expansion planned at 1MW. No liquid cooling confirmed — qualifies on small capacity.

TRIPLE MATCH: PUE 1.05, Diggers direct liquid cooling (cold box with aluminum cold plates), 6MW connected load (A1 NGDC). 8 cold boxes, 80kW compute, 50C output water suitable for district heating. 98% waste heat utilization rate. 100% renewable energy. 8,000 sqm facility.

PUE 1.19 (Zurich West 2), hybrid air/liquid cooling for high-density computing, 40MW from two substations, 100,000-litre cooling liquid storage tanks. Free cooling using ambient air. 100% renewable energy. Prix Watt d'Or awarded. Tier IV.

facility_name: Aruba IT3 Global Cloud Data Center
notes: Italy's largest data center. Liquid cooling activated July 31, 2024 for high-density GPU/processor workloads. Primary cooling via 9C groundwater (Alfa Laval heat exchangers). 200,000 sqm campus. 100% renewable (hydro + solar). ANSI/TIA-942-B Rating 4.

PUE 1.2 via EUR 15M river cooling system. Underground mine water at 15C year-round through 3km buried pipework. Eliminates electric chillers. Saves 18,400 MWh/year, 795 tonnes CO2. Hot water output feeds Euromediterranee urban heating (500,000 sqm). 30x more efficient than traditional cooling.

Direct liquid cooling (DLC) + air cooling hybrid, 27MW IT capacity across 12,000 sqm. AI/high-density ready. 100% renewable energy matched. Phases 1-2 live, Phases 3-4 completing 2026. New campus opened Nov 2025.

PUE 1.15 via indirect adiabatic cooling and hot-aisle containment. WUE 0.380 L/kWh. ISO 14001 certified. 100% green electricity. Greenhouse Datacenters (co-located operator) investing in liquid cooling for AI. Tier 3, N+1 redundancy.
PUE 1.2, multiple cooling technologies: direct-to-chip (up to 130kW/rack), immersion, rear door cooling. Expanding to 150MW. Security levels 3+ to 4. 140+ kW/rack density supported. AI/HPC focused.

Closed-loop liquid cooling, 14.4MW IT power Phase 1 (43MW at full build-out across 3 buildings). Region's most advanced DC for AI. 19,000 sqm colocation, 50,000+ server capacity. Opened September 18, 2025.

PUE 1.1, world's first gigawatt-scale seawater cooling, integrated liquid cooling. SIN01: 26MW IT (expanded from 14MW via liquid cooling). WUE 0. 100% renewable. OCP Ready v2 certified. European Data Center Project of the Year 2025. EUR 8.5B campus investment.

address: Vila Franca de Xira, Lisbon District
notes: PUE 1.15 portfolio-wide. ThermalWorks waterless cooling: 70kW/rack (air) up to 200kW/rack (liquid cooling plug-and-play). 180MW critical power (expandable to 300MW). Zero water consumption for cooling. Saves 2.7B liters water/year vs conventional. 100% renewable. OCP Ready.

PUE 1.2 with virtually no water for cooling. Closed-loop chilled water via air-cooled chillers. 52MW IT (32MW + 20MW buildings). EUR 1B investment. On-site 100MVA multi-fuel generation (HVO renewable + gas). 22-acre campus.

Design PUE 1.2, expanding by 4.5MW (Feb 2025). 14MW total. Heat pump system: 25C hot water returned, cooled to 12C, heats local school, daycare, swimming pool, nursery. AI optimization of PUE planned. 100% renewable.

First certified AI data center with liquid cooling in MENA. 100MW across 20 data halls (5MW each). Closed-loop liquid and chip-to-chip cooling. Uptime Tier III certified. HPE DLC partnership for AI hosting. G42 subsidiary with hyperscale GPU cluster tenants.

facility_name: Khazna AUH6+AUH7 — Abu Dhabi AI Expansion
notes: Two new AI-ready data centers in Abu Dhabi broke ground April 2025. Part of Microsoft+G42 200MW expansion. Khazna deploys DLC and immersion systems across portfolio. HPE DLC partnership active.

Largest AI campus outside US. Phase 1 = 200MW, total campus = 5GW. OpenAI+Oracle operated. NVIDIA partnership implies liquid cooling required at this scale/density. Desert climate demands advanced cooling. Massive opportunity.

stc subsidiary expanding to 300MW by 2027. AI-optimized data halls with enhanced liquid cooling readiness for GPU-intensive training and inference. $10B investment. Also partnered with Humain for 1GW JV.

Saudi sovereign AI JV between stc and Humain. 65MW Phase 1 Riyadh (March 2026), 50MW Phase 2 Jeddah (late 2026). AI-ready implies liquid cooling. Humain $100B+ program drives immersion/liquid cooling adoption across KSA.

WATCHLIST: 300MW across 6 Saudi facilities. MCIT committed to sustainable cooling. SASO 2023 mandates liquid cooling for new Saudi DCs. Solar PV feasibility study underway. No confirmed liquid cooling yet but regulatory environment requires it.

Saudi-origin DC operator with 100kW/rack capability requiring liquid cooling. SASO mandate applies. Dammam is dominant colocation market in KSA (130MW+). Fast-rising player in Saudi's booming DC market.
WATCHLIST: UAE's largest independent DC operator. $5B KKR investment. DXB5 pre-leased. GCC expansion planned. No verified cooling details yet. Dubai's extreme heat (45C+) demands advanced cooling.

facility_name: Africa Data Centres CPT1 — Cape Town (Gold Synergy CDU)
notes: Africa's first rack-level CDU cooling deployment. Gold Synergy self-cooling rack at CPT1. Zero water cooling. 3,000 NVIDIA GPUs deployed June 2025 (first phase of $700M Cassava-NVIDIA partnership). Plans to expand CDU tech across ADC network in 5 African countries.

WATCHLIST: Kenya's first GPU-as-a-Service, NVIDIA NCP architecture. If Gold Synergy CDU tech from CPT1 is replicated here (as announced), this will qualify on cooling. Pre-construction = highest-value cooling sales lead.

Uganda's first Tier III DC. 1.5MW capacity across 3 phases. Indirect Adiabatic Cooling (first IAC in East Africa). Small facility = MW match. Raxio expanding across 8 African countries with IFC $100M backing.
3MW facility, 800 racks. Raxio claims unrivalled PUE in Africa (no specific number published). Qualifies on MW only. Ethiopia is emerging DC market with Raxio as anchor.
Angola's largest DC. 3MW expanding to 7MW. $30M investment. 70% renewable. Tier III. Qualifies on MW. On-site water treatment plant = sophisticated infrastructure operator.
1.5MW facility in Kinshasa. Qualifies on MW only. DR Congo's first Tier III data center.
WATCHLIST: Equinix's first greenfield in West Africa. 610 sqm likely = small facility. Advanced cooling mentioned but not specified. $100M Africa pipeline = follow-up opportunities.

WATCHLIST: Morocco government 500MW renewable DC. Natural cooling systems planned. AI/HPC targeted. Pre-construction = prime timing for cooling vendor engagement. Desert climate = advanced cooling mandatory. Separate from Naver Morocco project.

LATAM's largest DC campus. Phase 2 operational with liquid cooling up to 100kW/rack. PUE 1.35. 100MW new cluster under construction for 2025. Total campus: 600MW across 17 buildings. Master plan approved. $1.13B Phase 2 investment.
20MW AI-ready facility with liquid cooling CAPABILITY (not yet deployed). Market-leading PUE claim. Renewable energy ready. Expansion potential. Pre-deployment = cooling vendor sales opportunity.

WATCHLIST: Colombia-UAE sovereign cloud initiative. 3 DCs in Santa Marta. $80M+, 30MW total. AI infrastructure planned. Pre-construction = cooling decision not yet locked. UAE partners likely bring Gulf cooling experience.
7MW facility in Santiago. Qualifies on MW (<=10MW). Oracle FastConnect partner. EdgeConneX is expanding LATAM presence with BOG11 (Bogota) at 28+MW.
DAMAC Digital (rebranded June 2025) operates hybrid cooling in Riyadh. PUE improved 1.45 to 1.37 with adiabatic+R1234ze system. Liquid immersion in portfolio. Expanding globally to 4,000MW.
